title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A veritable mountain of plushies, all for me.
Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I feel not only happy, but also strangely at
peace. I can't help but smile.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting this soft, warm feeling—and not just
from the plushies themselves.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's because... this gift came from the
heart.
